resources.string: Rewind
Not watching. Nothing is being recorded.
Watching your screen — the last 10 seconds are always ready.
Start Rewind
Stop Rewind
⏪ Save last 10 seconds
⏪ Save last %s
Replay window — how far back a save reaches
Applies the next time you start Rewind
Rewind Pro
Reach back %1$s instead of 10 seconds. Rewind Pro is %2$s — cancel anytime in Google Play.
Reach back %1$s instead of 10 seconds with a Rewind Pro subscription — cancel anytime in Google Play.
Get Rewind Pro
Not now
Subscriptions unlock once Rewind is live on Google Play — coming soon.
Stop
Rewind is watching
Something happen? Tap “Save last 10 seconds”.
Saved!
The last 10 seconds are in your gallery. Tap to watch.
⏪ Saved the last 10 seconds to your gallery
Could not save the clip — try again.
Nothing to save yet — give it a few seconds.

How it works: Rewind quietly keeps only the last 10 seconds of your screen in memory — nothing is saved anywhere until YOU tap Save. Saved clips land in your gallery under Movies/Rewind. Use the button here or the one in your notifications from any app.
